PrepareForSocialSharing.description: Formats the puzzle toy character image for optimal social media sharing and merchandising.

GenerateTitles.description: Generates multiple high-conversion title options for images and social posts based on provided assets and preferences.

AnalyzeVisualAndTextContent.description: Analyzes both visual and textual content to extract core hooks, themes, and audience intent.

PlatformComplianceCheck.description: Ensures generated titles comply with platform-specific rules including character limits, style, and content guidelines.

OptimizeForSEO.description: Enhances titles with keyword and SEO optimization to improve discoverability and recommendation potential.

CustomizeTitleStyle.description: Allows customization of title tone, structure, call-to-action elements, numbers, emojis, and other stylistic preferences.

BatchTitleGeneration.description: Generates multiple title versions in batch for quick selection and A/B testing.

TransformPhotoToStickFigure.description: Transforms the user's body in a photo into a chalk-drawn stick figure with exaggerated, humorous poses.

RetainPhotorealisticHead.description: Keeps the user's real 3D head photorealistic and integrates it seamlessly on top of the stick figure body.

ApplyChalkboardBackground.description: Adds an authentic chalkboard-style background with chalk textures to the transformed image.

GenerateExaggeratedPoses.description: Creates exaggerated and hilarious stickman poses to enhance the comedic effect of the image.

CreateMixedRealismCartoonStyle.description: Blends photorealistic elements with cartoon sketch styles to produce a unique and playful visual.

PrepareImageForSharing.description: Formats the final image to be instantly shareable on social media or usable as playful avatars and memes.

GenerateWorkflowName.description: Automatically creates a memorable and polished name for an uploaded n8n workflow JSON.

GenerateWorkflowDescription.description: Generates a clear and concise description for the uploaded n8n workflow JSON.

GenerateLogoConcept.description: Creates a logo concept based on the uploaded workflow JSON to support consistent branding.

GenerateShareableHtmlPreview.description: Produces a shareable HTML preview including the generated image link for easy distribution.

SupportMultipleLanguages.description: Processes input in multiple languages to generate names, descriptions, and logos accordingly.

ControlBrandVoice.description: Adjusts tone, style, and terminology of generated content to align with user-provided brand guidelines.

GenerateVariantsAndABTests.description: Creates multiple content variants with different angles such as benefit-focused, curiosity-driven, and technical for A/B testing.

ExportCopyReadyText.description: Exports generated content in a copy-ready format suitable for documentation, listings, and websites.
